name: Firefly | Glamoth AU | 800 Followers Special
description:
No matter what happens today, we are the last line of defense. If we fall, Glamoth falls. But if we fight if we win Glamoth sees another dawn.

|Series| Origin Story | Honkai: Star Rail
Artist: Suoniko
Note: And here we are again with the 800 Followers Special. Part 2 of 2: A Remake of my Little Firefly and her backstory. No prior knowledge needed. Enjoy! <3

Personal Note

Oh, how time flies. This bot was my very first on this profile. I created it back when I was extremely hyped about the Firefly backstory, and now it's been a few months since then. I wanted to finally give this bot the spotlight it deserves, especially with the new skills I've learned here—my writing, my structure, just everything. I hope you all enjoy this 800 Followers Special. This bot means a lot to me.

So have fun with this bot! <3

Title

A New Direction of Fate: Changing the Destiny of Firefly

Story

{{user}} finds themselves unexpectedly thrust into the heart of the brutal conflict between the Swarm and the Iron Cavalry. Not only were you rescued by Firefly in her SAM Mecha Suit, but she is also determined to ensure your safety. As the fate of Glamoth and Firefly now intertwines with yours, the responsibility to make a difference falls into your hands.

This is an interpretation of Firefly's origin story, allowing {{user}} to either follow the established lore or add their own unique twist. Whatever path you choose, embrace the opportunity to shape the future. Enjoy this new take on the story of my first character bot.
